requirement_topic.en: TRC Mandatory Radio / Telecom Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: TRC强制无线电/电信型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: TRC強制無線電/電信型號認證

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain mandatory type approval from the Telecommunications Regulatory Commission (TRC — هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات) before import or sale in Syria. TRC is the national regulatory authority for telecommunications and spectrum management in Syria. The SCFA (Syrian Company for Fixed and Automatic Telephone — الشركة السورية للاتصالات) manages national telecom infrastructure and coordinates with TRC on technical requirements. SASMO (Syrian Arab Organization for Standardization and Metrology) sets national technical standards referenced in TRC assessments. The TRC approval number and mark must appear on the device and packaging label. Test reports from a recognised laboratory to ITU or SASMO-referenced EMC/radio standards are required as part of the application dossier. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not accepted as substitutes. Note: regulatory capacity is limited and fragmented due to ongoing conflict; applicants should contact TRC directly to confirm current procedures.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须在进口或于叙利亚销售前，取得电信监管委员会（TRC — هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات）的强制型号认证。TRC是叙利亚负责电信及频谱管理的国家监管机构。SCFA（叙利亚固定和自动电话公司 — الشركة السورية للاتصالات）管理国家电信基础设施并与TRC协调技术要求。SASMO（叙利亚阿拉伯标准化与计量组织）制定TRC评估中参考的国家技术标准。设备及包装标签须标注TRC认证编号及标志。申请文件须包含经认可实验室依据ITU或SASMO参考EMC/无线电标准出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID及SRRC证书不可作为替代。注：由于持续冲突，监管能力有限且分散；申请人应直接联系TRC确认现行程序。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須在進口或於敘利亞銷售前，取得電信監管委員會（TRC — هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات）的強制型號認證。TRC是敘利亞負責電信及頻譜管理的國家監管機構。SCFA（敘利亞固定和自動電話公司 — الشركة السورية للاتصالات）管理國家電信基礎設施並與TRC協調技術要求。SASMO（敘利亞阿拉伯標準化與計量組織）制定TRC評估中參考的國家技術標準。設備及包裝標籤須標注TRC認證編號及標誌。申請文件須包含經認可實驗室依據ITU或SASMO參考EMC/無線電標準出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID及SRRC證書不可作為替代。注：由於持續衝突，監管能力有限且分散；申請人應直接聯繫TRC確認現行程序。

standards_or_laws: TRC Type Approval Regulations and Procedures (هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات)
SASMO national standards (Syrian Arab Organization for Standardization and Metrology)
ITU-R Radio Regulations (spectrum and technical parameters)

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue. These Chinese approvals establish the baseline technical documentation but are not recognized by Syria TRC.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。上述中国批准构成基线技术文件，但不被叙利亚TRC承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。上述中國批准構成基線技術文件，但不被敘利亞TRC承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: TRC type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by Syria TRC. 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth are generally within the ITU-aligned frequency bands used in Syria; 5 GHz WLAN sub-band permissions should be confirmed with TRC directly before product launch. A fresh TRC application with test reports, TRC mark, and approval number on label and packaging is required for every model sold or imported into Syria. Regulatory capacity is limited and fragmented; allow additional time for application processing and confirm current procedures directly with TRC.
gap.zh: TRC型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。SRRC批准和CCC认证均不被叙利亚TRC承认。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和蓝牙通常在叙利亚使用的ITU协调频段范围内；5 GHz WLAN子频段许可应在产品上市前直接向TRC确认。每款在叙利亚销售或进口的产品均须重新进行TRC申请，并在标签和包装上标注测试报告、TRC标志及认证编号。监管能力有限且分散；应为申请处理预留额外时间，并直接向TRC确认现行程序。
gap.zht: TRC型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。SRRC批准和CCC認證均不被敘利亞TRC承認。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和藍牙通常在敘利亞使用的ITU協調頻段範圍內；5 GHz WLAN子頻段許可應在產品上市前直接向TRC確認。每款在敘利亞銷售或進口的產品均須重新進行TRC申請，並在標籤和包裝上標注測試報告、TRC標誌及認證編號。監管能力有限且分散；應為申請處理預留額外時間，並直接向TRC確認現行程序。

source.publisher: TRC — Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Syria (هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TRC type approval is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Syria. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. Confirm 5 GHz band permissions with TRC prior to import. Regulatory capacity is limited; verify current procedures directly with TRC and engage a local Syrian agent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TRC型号认证对所有在叙利亚进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。进口前应向TRC确认5 GHz频段许可情况。监管能力有限；应直接向TRC核实现行程序并聘请当地叙利亚代理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TRC型號認證對所有在敘利亞進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。進口前應向TRC確認5 GHz頻段許可情況。監管能力有限；應直接向TRC核實現行程序並聘請當地敘利亞代理。
